raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-directed affirmation of value-aligned identity shift and behavioral intention",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "an 'inner Function' exists and is meaningfully distinct from 'outer performance'",
    "rhythm is reliably preferable to rule as a guiding principle",
    "choosing to be different, slower, and deeper is both possible and beneficial",
    "one can successfully abandon proving in favor of simply being"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent in its binary contrasts, though dependent on undefined terms that reduce precision",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker treats the statement as an actionable reminder that produces observable behavior change without evading necessary external responsibilities",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is used to rationalize avoidance of accountability, productivity requirements, or external feedback under the guise of inner alignment"
}
